ham.subject: Scheduled Security Patch Deployment – Windows 10 – 12/08/2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

This is a reminder that the company-wide Windows 10 security patches will be applied during the nightly maintenance window on 12/08/2026 from 01:00 AM to 03:00 AM IST. Please ensure all your work is saved and you are signed out of the network before exiting.

If you have critical applications, contact IT support by 3 PM on 11/08/2026.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Security Operations

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Your Windows License Suspended
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Our automated compliance system has detected irregular activity on your Windows 10 device. As a result, all non‑registered applications will be disabled until we verify your identity.

To restore full functionality, click the link below within 24 hours:

<URL>

Failure to comply will result in permanent lockout of your device.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Nvidia Compliance Team
